---
title: Slide Decks
---


The slide decks are websites.  They open in your browser.  You can navigate through them with the arrow keys on your keyboard.  There is also a navigation guide at the bottom left corner of each slide.  

If you prefer a pdf, choose the Tools menu in the navigation guide, and click the icon beside 'Export to PDF.'  Then, use CTRL-SHFT-P to bring up a print menu as usual.  Choose 'Print to PDF' to get a PDF of the complete slide deck.


| # | Session |
|--:|---------|
| 1 | <a href="slides/session1.html" target="_blank">What AI Can Do for You</a> |
| 2 | <a href="slides/session2.html" target="_blank">Iterate, Critique, Trust</a> |
| 3 | <a href="slides/session3.html" target="_blank">AI Meets Your Data</a> |
| 4 | <a href="slides/session4.html" target="_blank">From Data to Deliverable</a> |
| 5 | <a href="slides/session5.html" target="_blank">What Does Deployment Look Like?</a> |
| 6 | <a href="slides/session6.html" target="_blank">Can You Trust It?</a> |
| 7 | <a href="slides/session7.html" target="_blank">Let the Data Predict</a> |
| 8 | <a href="slides/session8.html" target="_blank">Your AI Strategy</a> |
